test.create_query: CREATE TABLE build (id Int64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE probe (id Int64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO build SELECT number FROM numbers(50000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO probe SELECT randUniform(45000, 95000) FROM numbers(200000000)
test.query: SELECT p.id, b.id FROM probe p INNER JOIN build b ON p.id = b.id FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filter_shared_fixed_hash_table = 0
SELECT p.id, b.id FROM probe p INNER JOIN build b ON p.id = b.id FORMAT Null SETTINGS enable_join_runtime_filter_shared_fixed_hash_table = 1
